script.title: Unlock Your Youthful Glow!

title: Sooryehan Hyobidam Fermented Skincare Gift Set with Wild Ginseng - Premium Korean Anti-Aging Skin Care Kit for Intense Hydration, 13.53 fl oz (Full Size Toner & Emulsion + Mini Cream, Eye Cream, Mask)
bullets: HYOBIDAM FERMENTED SKINCARE SET - Each set comes with Fermented Toner (5.07fl oz & 0.67fl oz), Fermented Emulsion (5.07fl oz & 0.67fl oz), Fermented Essence (0.17fl oz), Fermented Cream (0.34fl oz), Fermented Eye Cream (0.17fl oz), Anti-aging Pack (1.35 fl oz).

LUXURIOUS SKINCARE - The Hyobidam Fermented Skincare Collection features the exclusive ingredient Baekhyodan, which significantly reduces fine lines and deeply hydrates the skin for a youthful appearance.
NATURAL INGREDIENTS - This collection includes Wild Ginseng sourced from the pristine environments of Mount Jiri, renowned for its powerful age-defying properties.

LIGHTWEIGHT ELEGANCE - Enjoy a lightweight yet luxurious texture in Sooryehan Hyobidam Fermented collection. The concentrated formula effortlessly absorbs, leaving your skin feeling supple and lustrous without heaviness. Experience elegance in skincare.

SOORYEHAN - As a brand of LG Beauty, Sooryehan defies age and beauty through traditional herbal medicinal methods. By using Korean Ginseng from the nature of Korea as the base ingredient, perfecting and extracting its skincare potential through Korean Herbal Medicine Cosmetics (Hanbang) Bio-Technology, Sooryehan is the full embodiment of eternal beauty through creating skincare products to help your skin achieve its glowing and ageless potential.

script.title: Unlock the Secret to Youthful Skin!
script.narration: Does your skin feel tired and dull? Meet the Sooryehan Hyobidam Fermented Skincare Set! Infused with Wild Ginseng, it deeply hydrates and minimizes fine lines for that youthful glow. Experience luxury that transforms your skin! Link is in the first comment!

title: ASUS ROG Azoth Wireless Mechanical Gaming Keyboard – 75% TKL, Tri-Mode Connectivity, Hot Swappable Pre-lubed ROG NX Snow Linear Switches, PBT Keycaps, RGB, OLED Display, PC/Mac Support - White
bullets: Tri-mode connectvity: Seamlessly connect to three devices via Bluetooth. Experience ultra-low latency gameplay with ROG SpeedNova wireless technology in 2.4 GHz RF mode (2000+ hours battery life with OLED & RGB off), or utilize a standard wired USB connection.

Gasket Mount & Premium Sound Tuning: A silicone gasket mount and three layers of integrated dampening foam work in harmony to absorb vibrations and eliminate pinging noises, creating a uniquely satisfying sound signature and a consistent, flex-free typing feel.

Hot Swappable, Pre-Lubricated Mechanical Switches: Customize your keystrokes with ROG NX Snow linear switches (buttery smooth and thocky out-of-the-box) or ROG NX Storm clicky switches (crisp, tactile feedback). Durable PBT doubleshot keycaps provide a premium feel.

Complete Custom Keyboard / DIY Kit: Dive into keyboard customization with confidence. The hot-swap PCB allows for easy installation of your preferred 3-pin switches. The included professional kit provides everything you need: Krytox GPL-205-GD0 lubricant, switch opener, pullers, lube station, and brush. Perfect for beginners and experienced modders alike.

OLED Screen & Intuitive Controls: Monitor CPU/GPU stats, media playback, and keyboard settings in real-time on the integrated 2-inch OLED screen. A multi-function control knob provides tactile adjustment for volume, lighting, and more, offering unparalleled command.

script.title: Unlock Your Gaming Potential!
script.narration: POV: You just found the missing piece for your gaming setup. The ASUS ROG Azoth Wireless Keyboard combines buttery smooth keystrokes and ultra-low latency. Customize it your way and experience a typing sensation like no other! Link is in the first comment!

title: ASUS ROG Azoth X Wireless Mechanical Gaming Keyboard – 75% TKL, Tri-Mode Connectivity, Hot Swappable Pre-lubed ROG NX V2 Snow Linear Switches, South-Facing PCB, PBT Keycaps, PC/Mac Support - White
bullets: Tri-mode connectvity: Seamlessly connect to three devices via Bluetooth. Experience ultra-low latency gameplay with ROG SpeedNova wireless technology in 2.4 GHz RF mode (1600+ hours battery life with OLED & RGB off), or utilize a standard wired USB connection.

Deep, Crisp Typing Sounds & Comfortable Feel: Enjoy sublime acoustics thanks to the gasket mount and five-layer dampening design. A silicone layer and four PORON layers absorb vibrations and switch ping, while the FR4 positioning plate provides a more flexible typing feel and low-pitched, crisp sound.

Hot Swappable, Pre-Lubricated Mechanical Switches: Choose between upgraded ROG NX V2 Snow linear switches (buttery smooth and thocky) or ROG NX V2 Storm clicky switches (crisp, tactile feedback). Durable PBT doubleshot keycaps provide a premium feel.

Premium Aesthetics & Customization: The south-facing PCB maximizes keycap compatibility, allowing for personalized setups and advanced lighting effects. Stellar-themed ROG keycaps enhance the RGB lighting with a semi-translucent design. Further personalize your custom gaming keyboard style with the hot-swappable keycaps.

OLED Display & Intuitive Controls: Monitor CPU/GPU stats, media playback, custom animations, PC/Mac mode indicators, and other keyboard settings in real-time on the integrated 2-inch OLED screen. A multi-function control knob provides tactile adjustment for volume, lighting, and more, offering unparalleled command.

script.title: Unlock Your Gaming Potential with This Keyboard!
script.narration: POV: You just found the missing piece for your gaming setup. The ASUS ROG Azoth X combines buttery smooth typing with ultra-low latency, letting you switch between devices seamlessly. Elevate your game with stunning RGB and custom keycaps. Link is in the first comment!

title: 2000A Jump Starter with Air Compressor, Car Battery Jumper Starter Portable with 160PSI Auto-Shutoff Tire Inflator, Car Battery Charger Jump Box for 8.0L Gas/6.0L Diesel Engines
bullets: Powerful Starts, Every Time: Start your vehicle with confidence using this high-performance battery jumper starter portable. With a peak current of 2000A, it provides the instant boost needed to start 12V vehicles with engines up to 8.0L gasoline or 6.0L diesel—even in extreme temperatures ranging from -4°F to 140°F. Whether you're driving a car, SUV, pick-up truck, motorcycle, or lawnmower, this jump box for car battery delivers reliable, on-demand power when you need it most

Ultra-Long-Lasting Power: This jump starter features a high-density, military-grade lithium battery with a total capacity of 2600 mAh ×4 (4S), providing a stable and powerful output. Even on chilly mornings, this jump starter provides reliable energy to get your vehicle going quickly. Its intelligent sleep mode and ultra-low standby power consumption help retain more energy between uses, reducing the need for frequent charging

Safer and More Reliable: Our jump starter with air compressor features a high-efficiency Battery Management System (BMS) that monitors, controls, and optimizes the battery pack in real time. The car jump starter helps protect and extend battery life while delivering safety performance up to three times greater than standard starters. With 10 key protections—such as short circuit, overcurrent, and overheating protection—it ensures your car starts smoothly and safely without risk of damage

More Durable: This battery jump starter box is built with aerospace-grade, high-strength composite materials, and its internal precision circuit board is secured using suspension anti-vibration technology—providing excellent resistance to impact and drops. Even if accidentally dropped from a height (such as the hood), it effectively absorbs shock and protects core components. Tested through thousands of lab drop tests, this jump box for car battery remains strong and reliable

Strong Air Compressor: This car battery charger features a high-performance air compressor with an upgraded pump system and powerful motor, delivering airflow up to 35L/min for noticeably faster inflation than traditional units. It inflates standard tires quickly, helping drivers get back on the road sooner. The dual heat-dissipation design with an internal cooling fan keeps temperatures lower, supporting faster cooling, longer lifespan, and better tire protection during continuous use

script.title: Unlock the Ultimate Roadside Emergency Solution!
script.narration: POV: You just found the ultimate roadside companion! This 2000A Jump Starter with Air Compressor is your go-to for powerful starts every time, even in extreme temps. Say goodbye to dead batteries and flat tires. Trust me, your future self will thank you! Link is in the first comment!

title: S ZEVZO ET03 Car Jump Starter 4000A Jump Starter Battery Pack for Up to 8.0L Gas and 7.0L Diesel Engines, 74Wh Portable 12V Jump Box with USB Ports, LCD Display, Storage Case, and LED Light
bullets: POWERFUL CAR BATTERY JUMP STARTER: The ET03 car battery jump starter can easily jump-start all 12V common vehicles with up to 8.0L gas and 7.0L diesel engines in seconds with its peak current reaching 4000 amps. Supports 50 jump starts at most on a single charge and suitable for lawnmowers, motorcycles, passenger cars, trucks, and even boats, etc.

STARTS 0V DEAD BATTERIES EASILY: This car battery jump starter has integrated the force start function in the jumper clamps, which delivers powerful performance to bring your vehicle back to life even if the vehicle has a completely dead battery at 0V. Please make sure this battery jump starter is fully recharged or above 14V if you want to use this jump starter on a car with a dead battery.

BACKUP PORTABLE POWER BANK: This jump starter battery pack can also work as a 74Wh large battery capacity portable power bank to charge your smartphones, tablets, or other USB electric devices. Two 5V/2A USB output ports are packed on this jump starter that can be applied at the same time for charging, 50% faster than a standard charger.

PACKED WITH LED EMERGENCY LIGHT AND BONUS FEATURES : the ET03 car jump starter is packed with a 500-lumens LED flashlight to provide help in darkness or for emergency situations that support three variable light modes (stable, strobe, and SOS). There are more features included such as an LCD screen to check the battery status, a wide working temperature from 14℉ to 140℉, and 24 months long standby time.

10 INTELLIGENT SAFTY PROTECTIONS: This jump starter battery pack is super safe to use with 10 intelligent safety protections against overcharge, short circuits, reverse polarity, power surging and sparking, and so forth. You can detect the errors by simply checking the lights and the beep sound from the smart jumper clamps.

script.title: The Ultimate Car Rescue Tool!
script.narration: Does your car battery dying ruin your day? Meet the S ZEVZO ET03! This powerhouse jump starter brings your dead battery back to life in seconds, even at 0V! Plus, it doubles as a portable power bank for all your devices. Link is in the first comment!

title: RK ROYAL KLUDGE S98 Mechanical Keyboard w/Smart Display & Knob, Top Mount 96% Wireless Mechanical Keyboard BT/2.4G/USB-C, Hot Swappable, Software Support, Creamy Sounding, 98 Keys
bullets: Big Features on a Small Screen - Is there anything it can't display? Custom gif image, date. connection mode, WIN/MAC layout, battery status, etc.
Knob Design- Adjust volume, connection mode, backlit brightness/speed, RGB mode/color, all it takes is just a twist or a click.
BT5.0/2.4G/USB-C - Wireless keyboard with stable BT 5.0, hassle-free 2.4Ghz dongle plus USB-C wired mode set no limits about your keyboard connection.
Gaming Friendly Top-Mount Design - Offers a superior tactile consistency, firm feeling, and better noice reducing creamy keyboard.

Sound Absorbing Foams - Equipped with IXPE switch dampener pad, 2 layers of thicker sound-absorbing foams, silicone dampener pad, which reduces 40% noise and removes 80% hallow sound. Bringing creamy or thocky sounding, natural and clear feedback, no more cavities noise.

script.title: Unlock Your Ultimate Gaming Experience!
script.narration: Does your keyboard feel stale and uninspired? Meet the RK ROYAL KLUDGE S98! With its smart display and customizable knob, this mechanical marvel transforms your setup. Experience creamy sound and effortless controls that elevate your game. Link is in the first comment!

title: RK ROYAL KLUDGE M75 Mechanical Keyboard with OLED Smart Display and Volume Knob, 2.4G/USB-C/BT Gasket Mounted 75% Layout Wireless Gaming Keyboard with 81 Keys, RGB Backlit Hot-Swappable Brown Switch
bullets: Multi-function OLED Smart Display & Knob: RK M75 keyboard features a built-in OLED screen and rotary knob; Display battery level, connection mode, and volume, while the knob adjusts volume, switches modes, and powers the keyboard
